title: taraxacum ampliusculum
intro: Taraxacum ampliusculum, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to Europe and Asia. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and kidney problems. The health benefits of Taraxacum ampliusculum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum ampliusculum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
